div.head: The Chargé in Nicaragua (Dennis) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 196. Diaz was designated this afternoon at 1 by Congress in joint session of both Houses. All 21 unseated members were admitted; 53 members present, of whom 44 voted for Diaz. Liberal members withdrew before vote and stated that they would present memorial tomorrow declaring they considered Sacasa President. Two votes were cast for resolution declaring Solorzano President. Inaugural ceremony to take place Sunday 14th at 4 afternoon which I shall attend.
Diaz and Cuadra Pasos called at Legation immediately afterwards. Diaz stated he would form a new Cabinet. Repeated to Central American Republics.
